# InnovaAI

> InnovaAI is an applied AI consultancy and product studio based in Bolivia, serving companies in Latin America.

InnovaAI helps companies use artificial intelligence to save time, organize information, improve operations, and prepare teams to adopt AI responsibly.

## Main Pages

- [Spanish homepage](https://innovaai-landing.onrender.com/es/): Applied AI consulting for companies in Latin America.
- [English homepage](https://innovaai-landing.onrender.com/en/): Applied AI consulting for companies, focused on practical adoption.
- [DentiMed Spanish](https://innovaai-landing.onrender.com/es/dentimed/): Voice-assisted dental clinic documentation and follow-up.
- [DentiMed English](https://innovaai-landing.onrender.com/en/dentimed/): Voice-assisted dental clinic records and follow-up.

## What InnovaAI Does

- Applied AI consulting for companies.
- Process analysis to identify practical AI opportunities.
- Automation support for repetitive work.
- Internal information organization so teams can find reliable answers faster.
- Team training and adoption support.
- AI product development through Dicta and DentiMed.

## Products

- Dicta: voice dictation and instant translation for daily work.
- DentiMed: voice-assisted dental records, digital odontogram, and patient follow-up for dental clinics.

## Contact

- Website: https://innovaai-landing.onrender.com/es/
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/59172004767
